title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.440 - Compensation of officers and employees
text:
77.440.  Compensation of officers and employees. — The council shall have power to fix the compensation of all officers and employees of the city.
(RSMo 1939 § 6893, A.L. 1955 p. 290, A.L. 1990 H.B. 986) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6747; 1919 § 8234; 1909 § 9171
